title: Whiteout Survival Troop Stats Reference - T1-T10 x FC1-FC10

column_semantics.fire_crystal_level: The Level column in the source tables; interpreted as Fire Crystal troop level FC1-FC10.
column_semantics.attack: Attack value displayed in the source table.
column_semantics.defense: Defense value displayed in the source table.
column_semantics.health: Health value displayed in the source table.
column_semantics.lethality: Lethality value displayed in the source table.
column_semantics.fire_crystal_troop_skill: The source card shows an upgrade icon at FC3, FC5, FC8 and FC10. upgrade_at_this_fc preserves that event; active_skills carries the cumulative skill state for direct lookup at every FC level.

troop_stats_pdf.usage: All tier names and all 300 Attack/Defense/Health/Lethality rows.

fire_crystal_skill_page.usage: Fire Crystal skill unlock context. The page states that FC3 grants an additional skill and FC5 upgrades it; the PDF itself also displays skill upgrade icons at FC3, FC5, FC8 and FC10.

previously_supplied_skill_reference.usage: Skill names and effect text included in skill_catalog. No external sources beyond user-supplied material were used.

FC8.effect: +4% Defense; additional damage reduction while Crystal Shield is active

FC10.effect: +6% Defense; additional damage reduction while Crystal Shield is active

FC3.effect_status: Exact level-1 effect text was not available in the supplied machine-readable references and was not guessed.

FC8.effect: +4% basic attack damage; additional damage while Crystal Gunpowder is active

FC10.effect: +6% basic attack damage; additional damage while Crystal Gunpowder is active

_extraction.method: OCR-assisted visual transcription from extracted PDF card images
_extraction.verified_against: The 30 embedded troop-card images in TroopStats.pdf
_extraction.source_policy: Only user-supplied PDF, user-supplied website, and previously supplied troop-passives.md
_extraction.unknown_values_policy: Unknown effect text is null and explicitly identified; no guessed values.
